targets.rawSql:
WITH binned AS (
  SELECT
    ROUND((width_bucket(final_confidence, 0.0, 1.0, 10) - 1) * 0.1, 1) AS bucket_start,
    COUNT(*) AS n
  FROM processed.coding_results
  WHERE coding_path = 'hybrid_ce_llm_success'
    AND final_confidence IS NOT NULL
    AND final_confidence > 0
  GROUP BY 1
)
SELECT
  bucket_start,
  CASE WHEN bucket_start < 0.30 THEN n ELSE NULL END AS "01 Flag for Review",
  CASE WHEN bucket_start >= 0.30 AND bucket_start < 0.65 THEN n ELSE NULL END AS "02 Uncertain",
  CASE WHEN bucket_start >= 0.65 THEN n ELSE NULL END AS "03 Accept"
FROM binned
ORDER BY bucket_start

SELECT
  'Distribution' AS category,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE final_confidence < 0.30)                              AS "01 Flag for Review",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE final_confidence >= 0.30 AND final_confidence < 0.65) AS "02 Uncertain",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE final_confidence >= 0.65)                             AS "03 Accept"
FROM processed.coding_results
WHERE final_confidence > 0
  AND coding_path = 'hybrid_ce_llm_success'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Coded" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE coding_path IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pt_name) AS "Unique PTs" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE coding_path IS NOT NULL

SELECT mdr_report_key, pt_name, pt_code, llt_name,  ROUND(final_confidence::numeric, 3) AS confidence, ROUND(crossencoder_score::numeric, 3) AS crossencoder, coded_at FROM processed.coding_results WHERE coding_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY coded_at DESC LIMIT 2000
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN llm_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "LLM Success %" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE llm_status IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN flagged = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN flagged IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 1) AS "Flagged %" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE flagged IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN llm_status = 'timeout' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) AS "Timeout %" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE llm_status IS NOT NULL
SELECT ROUND(AVG(llm_latency_ms)/1000.0, 1) AS "Avg LLM (s)" FROM processed.coding_results WHERE llm_latency_ms IS NOT NULL AND llm_status = 'success'

SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', coded_at) AS time,
  COUNT(*) AS records_coded
FROM processed.coding_results
WHERE coded_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  AND coding_path IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1
